channel.title: GitHub CoffeeScript Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of CoffeeScript in GitHub

item.title: FelisCatus/SwitchyOmega
item.description: Manage and switch between multiple proxies quickly & easily.

item.title: lucassus/angular-coffee-seed
item.description: AngularJS seed based on grunt JavaScript tasks runner and bower a package manager for the web

item.title: adaltas/node-csv
item.description: Full featured CSV parser with simple api and tested against large datasets.
